query: INSERT INTO practiceTests (courseId, title, description, totalQuestions, timeLimit) SELECT id, 'RLA Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Reasoning Through Language Arts - Test 1', 50, 150 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'RLA Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Reasoning Through Language Arts - Test 2', 50, 150 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Math Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Mathematical Reasoning - Test 1', 46, 115 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Math Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Mathematical Reasoning - Test 2', 46, 115 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Science Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Science - Test 1', 40, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Science Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Science - Test 2', 40, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Social Studies Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Social Studies - Test 1', 50, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Social Studies Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Social Studies - Test 2', 50, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO practiceTests (courseId, title, description, totalQuestions, timeLimit) SELECT id, 'RLA Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Reasoning Through Language Arts - Test 1', 50, 150 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'RLA Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Reasoning Through Language Arts - Test 2', 50, 150 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Math Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Mathematical Reasoning - Test 1', 46, 115 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Math Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Mathematical Reasoning - Test 2', 46, 115 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Science Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Science - Test 1', 40, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Science Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Science - Test 2', 40, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Social Studies Practice Test 1', 'Full-length practice test for Social Studies - Test 1', 50, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Social Studies Practice Test 2', 'Full-length practice test for Social Studies - Test 2', 50, 90 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL';
